output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?ally ?allyLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q142 wdt:P327 ?alliance .
  ?alliance wdt:P256 ?ally .
  ?ally wdt:P31 wd:Q33542 .
  ?ally rdfs:label ?allyLabel .
  FILTER(langMatches(LANG(?allyLabel) , "en"))
}
